'''Honoghr''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Honoghr system/Legends|Honoghr system]].<ref name="TEA" />

{{Star-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
